hero.title: Tell me about your project.
hero.subtitle: Fill this out and I'll reply within 24 hours. The more context, the better the first reply.

form.name: Your name
form.messagePlaceholder: What are you building, what's the problem, who's it for?

errors.name: Please enter your name.
errors.message: Tell me a little about the project (10+ characters).
errors.generic: Something went wrong. Try emailing me directly instead.

success.title: Message sent — talk soon.
success.body: I'll reply within 24 hours. If you don't see anything by then, check spam or email me directly.
